caption: The video features a man seated at a table, likely participating in an interview or discussion at a tech-related event. He is wearing a blue shirt with a logo on the left side and has a microphone attached to his ear, indicating that he is speaking into it. The background prominently displays the logos for "theCUBE" and "SiliconANGLE," suggesting that this is part of a series or segment produced by these entities. On the table in front of him, there is a book titled "Big Data," which aligns with the hashtag "#BigDataSV 2015" visible in the bottom left corner of the screen. The setting appears professional, with a focus on technology and data topics, and the man seems engaged in explaining or discussing relevant information.
